description: An operational auditor analyzes call center data to identify opportunities for improvement.

nodes.task_description: Obtain call center performance data for the last year, including average handle time (AHT), first call resolution (FCR), and call volume.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor has the complete performance dataset.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the data and find that FCR has been steadily declining while AHT has been increasing.

expected_outcome.value: The analysis identifies a negative performance trend.

nodes.task_description: Listen to a sample of call recordings to identify the root cause, finding that new agents are struggling with a new software system.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor identifies a lack of training as the root cause.
